title: corylus americana f. calyculata
intro: Corylus americana f. calyculata, also known as American hazelnut, is a deciduous shrub native to the eastern regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Corylus americana f. calyculata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in herbal preparations such as salves and infusions to support skin and wound healing.
